code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    let tok = match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(t)
      t
    when None
      ""
    end
    match string.parse_int(tok)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        total = total + n * 2
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("result=#{total}")
end
